case.title: BALTIMORE & OHIO CHICAGO TERM. R. CO. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: BALTIMORE & OHIO CHICAGO TERM. R. CO. v. UNITED STATES, 389 U.S. 88 (1967)
opinion.h4: BALTIMORE & OHIO CHICAGO TERMINAL RAILROAD CO. ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 539. Decided November 6, 1967.
opinion.p: Acting Solicitor General Spritzer, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Robert W. Ginnane and Nahum Litt for the United States et al., and Don McDevitt for Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe et al., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
